Part A
You are taking part in a selfie exhibition called "Chubby Dicky". As part of the selfie exhibition, you presented two selfies. Now you need to give a title to each and a brief explanation of why these selfies are meaningful to you.


Title: Handsome Dicky boy in Instagram
The reasons why I showed this pic is manifold. First, Dicky is so charming that I has collected every selfies for him. This selfie is he posted in Instagram. It really mean so many to me because only after see these photo can me know that one can be so confidence even others does not think like this. That's why I very like to share this to you guys and even on LIHKG.



Title: Dicky Tsang is very popular
This one is his profile icon of telegram. This pic have much more meaning as it make you know you can be easily to go viral on the internet - you just need to self-explode and use a attractive selfie. My justification to which his popularity can be ascribed are manifold. But I just want to say that he got 5* (and could have got 5**) so he is smart too. Thank you.
